title: 大阪杯の後に・“1番”にむけて

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: I screwed up, right at the very end.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
And yet so far. If I'm not number one, what's the
point?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
I need to get back to training and start over from
the top! I have to get even stronger...

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: No, I will get even stronger!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: On the way home...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Yo.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Well, well. Look who it is.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
How come you're back in Japan so soon? Don't
tell me you lost and ran back home with your tail
between your legs?

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
You wish. I'm heading back out sometime this
year. But before I do...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: We need to settle things once and for all.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Once and for all, huh?

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Ever since the Queen Elizabeth II Cup, all I can
think about is... how much I wanna beat you.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
There's no way I can leave things as they are after
seeing how cool you were.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: What, that's it? That's what you came back for?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Fine. I'll take you up on that challenge.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
I've also been doing some thinking ever since the
Derby—about how much I want to beat you.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: I can tell you're not going to just let me have the number one title—but I'm not letting you take it either.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Haha. Would ya look at that? You sound just like
me.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: No, you're the one who's acting like me!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: We'll settle this at the autumn Tenno Sho.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The autumn Tenno Sho is quite prestigious even
among the G1 races. It represents one of the
highest honors an Umamusume in her senior year
can win.
choice_data_list: A win there will definitely earn you fans.
A win there will definitely earn you fans.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: And it's the chance of a lifetime, too.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Okay. I'll take part. But don't complain when I
blow right past you, Vodka.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
It's time to see who comes out on top. Who's
really number one.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Sure. But let me tell you one thing: I won't lose.
Especially not to you.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The stage has been set. All that's left is to get
ready for their final battle!
